title: AST Bear Baiting Violation: Bethel [AK25053179]
summary: On 06/02/2025, Bethel and McGrath AWT conducted a bear baiting patrol on the Gweek River in GMU 18 near Bethel. During the patrol, AWT located two unskinned beaver carcasses on a registered bear bait station. Investigation determined the beavers were shot the week prior, left to rot in a garage, the...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST MIW V / Citation: Tok [AK25054133]
summary: On 06/05/2025 at approximately 1332 hours, Alaska State Troopers were conducting patrols of the Tok area. In the parking lot of the Shell gas station, I observed a blue 2015 Ford F250 bearing an Alaska plate of JTB621 pulling a flatbed trailer with lumber which was not secured. The driver was identified as Andrew F. James, age 31. Upon initial contact with James, AST observed James' minor child was not properly secured in a child safety seat. Upon further investigation AST learned that James, after several minutes into the contact was concealing a firearm on his person. James failed to inform AST of the matter (concealing a firearm) and was further detained. James was issued a citation regarding his minor child not being properly secured inside the vehicle and further advised that he is ch
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

charges: Misconduct Involving Weapons in the Fifth Degree
entities.address_detail: further investigation AST learned that James

title: AST Probation Violation: Beaver [AK25053837]
summary: On 6/4/25 at 1246 hours, Cole Williams, 26 years old, was arrested for violating the terms of his probation. Williams is on Felony probation for assault in the third degree for assaulting a community member. Williams was recently reported to have fired off shots to scare a neighbor dog and then was....

title: India in the Arctic: Advancing a Path for Strategic Autonomy Beyond Russia
summary: While supporting a rules-based order in Indo-Pacific, New Delhi seems content to cooperate with Russia in the Arctic. The post India in the Arctic: Advancing a Path for Strategic Autonomy Beyond Russia appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
